title: American Legion Riders
body:
The American Legion Riders Chapter 118 combines the camaraderie of motorcycle riding with the Legion's tradition of service. The Riders participate in honor escort missions, charity rides, Bike Nights, and community events throughout Indiana.

Our members ride together for a purpose—honoring fallen veterans, supporting veterans causes, and strengthening the bonds of our Legion family. From summer Bike Nights at Post 118 to parades and community events, the Riders bring visibility and energy to the Legion's mission.

If you own a motorcycle, enjoy riding, and want to be part of something bigger, we'd love to have you join our ranks.
